body_transformation: Snorlax's rounded body now bears molten gold and crimson scales with deep charcoal cracks resembling magma flow, while its white fur patches glow with amber warmth. The curled tail tip transforms into a flickering flame-tipped spiral with ember sparks, and its stubby legs gain subtle heat-haze distortion at the joints. Small volcanic cracks appear along its dark blue fur contours, radiating faint orange light. Its rounded head retains its shape but features a smooth, heat-resistant hide with glowing amber highlights near the eyes.
signature_feature: Flame-tipped tail: molten gold scales with crackling ember sparks and glowing crimson fissures.
